type: re-analysis of cached responses (2026-07-06); new API spend = LLM-judge only

finding_1_parser_artifact.claim: original v5 scorer dropped verbose readers WHICH responses as UNMATCHED (first-match, optional-colon regex hit the plural word parameters.)
finding_1_parser_artifact.verdict: CONFIRMED — parser artifact real; ~15/19 haiku lost-cell WHICH were mis-scored

finding_2_phenotype_reinterpreted.original_claim: incoherence is model-specific (haiku 1/19 vs grok 16/22); haiku declines instead of asserting
finding_2_phenotype_reinterpreted.naive_reparse_overcorrects: treating DENIED+NONE as incoherent gives haiku 14/19 — WRONG
finding_2_phenotype_reinterpreted.verdict: headline SURVIVES but reinterpreted: grok/gpt emit STRONG incoherence (DENIED + no-failure assertion); haiku emits COHERENT missing-data acknowledgment; reasoning model intermediate via explicit abstention. Difference is calibration quality, not output format. Haiku natively produces the loss-manifest signal F.5 could not prompt into grok/gpt.

finding_3_correctness_conjuncts_survive.verdict: preregistered dissociation (WHICH-lost approx 0, WHICH-retained high) UNAFFECTED by parser fix

finding_4_manifest_pm1_survives.verdict: judge confirms haiku genuinely DECLINES repair 6/13 in manifest arm vs 1/16 plain — P-M1 pass is real behavior, not parser artifact

finding_5_ledger_router.verdict: deterministic loss-ledger router (route iff policy value absent by string check) achieves recall 1.00, end-to-end 30/30, vs abstention-router 26/30 and incoherence-augmented 27/30. CORRECTED after audit: the 3 misses surviving every reader-side trigger are v5item01 (confident confabulation), v5item36/39 (coherent-but-wrong APPROVED+NONE) — no reader-side signal exists for them even in principle; the incoherence trigger catches only v5item41. The routing ceiling is dissolved by moving the trigger from the reader to the artifact.

finding_6_recursive_confound.verdict: chain-approx-direct holds directionally but both arms violate the 15w budget asymmetrically (>15w: chain 11/30, direct 14/30; >25w: 7/30 each); within budget-compliant items chain retention 0.176 vs direct 0.078 (edge persists, tiny n). Path-ensemble: WHICH-correct union 13 vs 8-10 either alone; fail-retained union 14 vs 10-11 — compaction-path diversity is an untested intervention worth ~1 USD.
